name: @beamhop/shell-protocol
description: Shared protocol types and message envelopes for the beamhop shell transport.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
